tagline: A Sonoma family winery, from 60 cases on
seoDescription: Krutz Family Cellars: a Santa Rosa family winery founded in 2003, handcrafting small-lot, critically-acclaimed wines from prestigious Northern California vineyards, with personalized barrel tastings by reservation.
heroSubheading: Krutz Family Cellars began in 2003 with just 60 cases. Today the family crafts small-lot, critically-acclaimed wines from some of Northern California's most prestigious vineyards — tasted from the barrel, by reservation.
highlights: Syrah rated 94 points — Wine Enthusiast Editor's Choice
Family winery since 2003, from just 60 cases
Fruit from prestigious Northern California vineyards
aboutBody: Krutz Family Cellars started in 2003 with a single, hopeful batch — just 60 cases. In 2011 brothers Bryan and Cole Krutz joined Patrick as owners, and the family and the production have grown together into a small Sonoma County winery built on hands-on, personal winemaking.

The family sources fruit from some of the most prestigious vineyards across Northern California and makes the wine in small lots — work that's earned real recognition, including a 94-point Editor's Choice Syrah and a 93-point Chardonnay from Wine Enthusiast. Visits are personal by design: a reservation brings a one-on-one tour and a taste straight from the barrel.

services.title: Barrel Tastings
services.description: A personalized tour and a taste from the barrel, by reservation — Monday through Friday, 10am–4pm.

services.title: Award-Winning Small-Lot Wines
services.description: Critically-acclaimed, handcrafted wines from prestigious Northern California vineyards, made in limited quantities.

services.title: Wine Club
services.description: Join the family to receive new small-lot releases as they're bottled.

services.title: Private Tastings
services.description: Intimate, by-appointment tastings for small groups and special occasions.

notes: Enriched from verified web research (krutzfamilycellars.com, Wine Enthusiast scores via search, Sonoma County Tourism). Founded 2003 with 60 cases; Bryan & Cole joined Patrick in 2011. 93/94-pt Wine Enthusiast scores are real per search snippets — verify the exact vintages before sending.
